name: hcn-isomerization_reaction_profile
prompt: Run the reaction-profile task for the hcn-isomerization reaction using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase. Pass the reactant, product, and TS guess (shared atom ordering) with --reactant/--product/--ts-guess. Report the activation free energy delta_G_activation in kcal/mol as the headline value, plus the reaction free energy and the IRC connectivity verdict. State the method used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
